title: Refactor AI Work Item start orchestration

sources.reason: Target for splitting Work Item startup orchestration into lifecycle helpers.

riskAssessment.reason: Behavior-preserving internal refactor with existing startup regression coverage.

executionDecision.reason: Contracted behavior-preserving refactor is ready for implementation.

preReviewWarnings: Confirm Work Item lifecycle checks, preflight behavior, and generated artifacts remain unchanged.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: ai_start.main is decomposed into focused lifecycle, validation, generation, and status helpers without changing startup behavior.
Existing startup-path tests pass with an orchestration regression assertion.
Full AI Cockpit and project quality checks pass with no governance policy change.
guidelines: New public APIs must be documented.
Do not import internal modules from other features.

intent.problem: ai_start.main combines lifecycle validation, Work Item generation, preflight handling, and status reporting in one large function.
constraints: Preserve startup failure semantics and generated Contract/Summary contents.
Do not change governance policy or unrelated scripts.
intent.rationale: Separating startup responsibilities reduces maintenance risk in the Work Item entrypoint.

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: Set only when a human explicitly approves restricted governance paths.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
